source_query:
select count(*) from (
select recid, recversion, dpcreateddatetime, dpmodifieddatetime, isdelete from(  SELECT DISTINCT
  ISNULL(da.name, '') AS ['+{Dimension}+'Name],
  ISNULL(coalesce(dav.displayvalue, dalv.displayvalue, ''), '') AS [' + {Dimension} + 'Value],
  ISNULL(dft.description, '') AS [' + {Dimension} + 'Description],
  CONVERT(varchar(20), ISNULL(dav.activefrom, '1900-01-01'), 120) AS [ActiveFrom],    -- UPDATED
	CONVERT(varchar(20), ISNULL(dav.activeto, '1900-01-01'), 120) AS [ActiveTo],    
  ISNULL(dav.issuspended, 0) AS [IsSuspended],
  ISNULL(fgv.Description, '') AS [GlobalDimensionValue],
  ISNULL(dav.recid, 0) AS [Recid],
  ISNULL(dav.recversion, 0) AS [Recversion],python -m pytest tests/fabric/test_csv_driven_silver_to_gold_validation.py -v -s
  ISNULL(dav.lhname, '') AS [LHName],
  CONVERT(varchar(20), ISNULL(dav.dpcreateddatetime, '1900-01-01'), 120) AS DPCreatedDateTime,  -- UPDATED
	CONVERT(varchar(20), ISNULL(dav.dpmodifieddatetime, '1900-01-01'), 120) AS DPModifiedDateTime, -- UPDATED
  dav.isdelete
from (SELECT * FROM  [LH_Finance].[dbo].[dimensionattributevalue] WHERE dpmodifieddatetime > '2019-01-01 00:00:00') as dav
  left join  [LH_Finance].[dbo].[dimensionattribute] as da
  on da.recid = dav.dimensionattribute  and da.lhname = dav.lhname 
  left join  [LH_Finance].[dbo].[dimensionfinancialtag] as dft
  on dav.entityinstance = dft.recid AND  dav.lhname = dft.lhname
  left join  [LH_Finance].[dbo].[dimensionattributelevelvalue] as dalv
  on dalv.dimensionattributevalue = dav.recid AND dalv.lhname = dav.lhname
  left join  [LH_Finance].[dbo].[dimensionattributevaluegroupcombination] davg
  on davg.dimensionattributevaluegroup = dalv.dimensionattributevaluegroup AND dalv.lhname = davg.lhname
  left join  [LH_Finance].[dbo].[financeglobaldimensionvalues] fgv
  ON coalesce(dav.displayvalue, dalv.displayvalue, '') = fgv.Dimension_value
where da.name = '{Dimension}' AND coalesce(dav.displayvalue, dalv.displayvalue, '') <> '' and dav.isdelete=0) X
) as a

source_query:
select count(*) from (
select recid, recversion, dpcreateddatetime, dpmodifieddatetime, isdelete from(  SELECT DISTINCT
        ISNULL(MA.mainaccountid, '') AS [MainAccountID],
        ISNULL(MA.name, '') AS [MainAccountName],
        ISNULL(LCOA.name, '') AS [ChartOfAccounts],
        ISNULL(MA.[type], '') AS [Type],
        ISNULL(Enum.elementname, '') AS TypeDescription,
        ISNULL(MA.closing, '') AS [Closing],
        ISNULL(MAC.accountcategory, '') AS [AccountCategory],
        ISNULL(MAC.description, '') AS [CategoryDescription],
        CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(DAV.activefrom,'1900-01-01'),120) AS [Activefrom],
        CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(DAV.activeto,'1900-01-01'),120) AS [Activeto],
        ISNULL(MA.consolidationmainaccount, '') AS [ConsolidationMainAccount],
        ISNULL(AGC.globalconsolidationacctname, '') AS [GlobalConsolidationAcctName],
        ISNULL(MA.debitcreditproposal, 0) [DefaultDebitCredit],
        ISNULL(MA.recversion, 0) AS [RecVersion],
        ISNULL(MA.recid, 0) AS [Recid],
        ISNULL(MA.lhname, '') AS [LHName],
        CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(MA.dpcreateddatetime,'1900-01-01'),120) AS DPCreatedDateTime,
        CONVERT(varchar(20),ISNULL(MA.dpmodifieddatetime,'1900-01-01'),120) AS DPModifiedDateTime,
        MA.isdelete
    FROM (SELECT * FROM  [mainaccount] Mav --ISNULL((SELECT MaxProcessedDate FROM #MaxProcessedDate WHERE LHName = davp.LHName), '1900-01-01')) as dav
    WHERE dpmodifieddatetime > '2019-01-01 00:00:00') as MA
        LEFT JOIN  [ledgerchartofaccounts] LCOA 
            ON MA.ledgerchartofaccounts = LCOA.recid AND MA.lhname = LCOA.lhname
        LEFT JOIN  [mainaccountcategory] MAC 
            ON MA.accountcategoryref = MAC.accountcategoryref AND MA.lhname = MAC.lhname
        LEFT JOIN  [dimensionattributevalue] DAV 
            ON MA.recid = DAV.entityinstance AND MA.lhname = DAV.lhname
        LEFT JOIN  [dimensionattribute] DA 
            ON DAV.dimensionattribute = DA.recid AND DA.type = 2 AND MA.lhname = DA.lhname
        LEFT JOIN  [altglobalcoaconsolidation] AGC 
            ON AGC.globalconsolidationcode = MA.consolidationmainaccount AND MA.lhname = AGC.lhname
        LEFT JOIN  [enum] Enum 
            ON MA.[type] = Enum.elementvalue AND Enum.tablename = 'MainAccount' AND Enum.fieldname = 'Type'
    WHERE DA.Type = 2 and MA.isdelete =0 ) X
) as a

source_query:
;WITH DimensionValues AS
 (
  SELECT DISTINCT DAVG.dimensionattributevaluecombination,
    ISNULL(da.name, '') AS [name],
    ISNULL(coalesce(dav.displayvalue, dalv.displayvalue, ''), '') AS [value],
    DAVG.lhname,
    DAVC.recid,
    DAVC.costcentervalue,
    DAVC.departmentvalue,
    DAVC.businesssegmentvalue,
    DAVC.sitevalue,
    DAVC.intercompanyvalue,
    DAVC.projectcodevalue,
    DAVC.workervalue,
    DAVC.customertypevalue,
    DAV.recid DAVRECID
  FROM [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].dimensionattributevaluecombination DAVC
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattributevaluegroupcombination] DAVG
    ON DAVG.dimensionattributevaluecombination = DAVC.recid AND DAVG.lhname = DAVC.lhname
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattributelevelvalue] as dalv
    on DAVG.dimensionattributevaluegroup = dalv.dimensionattributevaluegroup AND dalv.lhname = DAVG.lhname
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattributevalue] as dav
    ON dalv.dimensionattributevalue = dav.recid AND dalv.lhname = dav.lhname AND dalv.partition = dav.partition
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattribute] as da
    on da.recid = dav.dimensionattribute AND da.partition = dav.partition and da.lhname = dav.lhname
 ),
 LatestStatus AS (
     SELECT
         wtst2.[partition],
         wtst2.recid,
         wtst2.contextrecid,
         wtst2.contextcompanyid,
   wtst2.lhname
     FROM (
         SELECT
     wtst2.*,
     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
         PARTITION BY wtst2.contextrecid
         ORDER BY wtst2.recid DESC
     ) AS rn
         FROM [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[workflowtrackingstatustable] wtst2
     JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[sqldictionary] sd ON sd.tableid = wtst2.contexttableid AND sd.fieldid = 0 AND sd.lhname = wtst2.lhname
         WHERE sd.name = 'LedgerJournalTable'
     ) wtst2
     WHERE wtst2.rn = 1
 ),
 TrackingTop AS (
     SELECT
    wtst.contextrecid,
    wtst.contextcompanyid,
    REPLACE(ui.name, ',', ' ') AS name,
    wtct.createddatetime,
    wtt.trackingtype,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY wtst.contextrecid, wtt.trackingtype
        ORDER BY wtt.recid DESC
    ) AS rn
     FROM [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[workflowtrackingtable] wtt
    JOIN LatestStatus wtst ON wtst.[partition] = wtt.[partition] AND wtst.recid = wtt.workflowtrackingstatustable AND wtt.lhname = wtst.lhname
    JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[workflowtrackingcommenttable] wtct ON wtct.[partition] = wtt.[partition] AND wtct.workflowtrackingtable = wtt.recid AND wtt.lhname = wtct.lhname
    JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[userinfo] ui ON ui.[partition] = wtt.[partition] AND ui.id = wtt.[user_] AND ui.lhname = wtt.lhname
     WHERE wtt.trackingtype IN (4, 23)
 ),
 wf AS (
  SELECT
      contextrecid,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 23 THEN name             END) AS submitted_by,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 23 THEN createddatetime  END) AS submitted_date,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 4  THEN name             END) AS approved_by,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 4  THEN createddatetime  END) AS approved_date
  FROM TrackingTop
  WHERE rn = 1
  GROUP BY contextrecid
 ),
 LJT_1 AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
   SELECT
     ljt.*,
     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
     PARTITION BY ljt.lhname, ljt.dataareaid, ljt.journalnum
     ORDER BY
      COALESCE(ljt.dpmodifieddatetime, ljt.posteddatetime, ljt.createddatetime) DESC,
      ljt.recid DESC
     ) rn
   FROM lh_finance_silver.lh_finance.ledgerjournaltable ljt
   WHERE ljt.posted = 1
  ) x
  WHERE rn = 1
 )
select count(*) from ( 
 SELECT 
  NULL PK_Fact_GL,
  ISNULL(GJAE.accountingcurrencyamount, 0) AS [Amount],
  ISNULL(GJAE.reportingcurrencyamount, 0) AS [AmountInReportingCurrency],
  ISNULL(GJAE.transactioncurrencyamount, 0) AS [AmountInTransactionCurrency],
  ISNULL(GJAE.postingtype , 0) AS [PostingType],
  ISNULL(GJAE.ledgeraccount, '') AS [LedgerAccount],
  ISNULL(GJAE.text, '') AS [Text],
  ISNULL(GJE.journalnumber, '') AS [JournalNumber],
  ISNULL(GJE.subledgervoucher, '') AS [SubledgerVoucher],
  ISNULL(LJT.createdby, '') AS [CreatedBy],
  ISNULL(LJT.createddatetime, '1900-01-01') AS [CreatedDateTime],
  ISNULL(GJE.postinglayer, 0) AS [Postinglayer],
  ISNULL(GJE.accountingdate, '1900-01-01') AS [AccountingDate],
  ISNULL(LJT.journalnum , '') AS [JournalBatchNumber],
  ISNULL(LJT.name , '') AS [JournalBatchDesc],
  ISNULL(LJT.approver, '') AS [ApprovedBy],
  ISNULL(LJT.journalname, '') AS [Name],
  ISNULL(LJT.posteddatetime, '1900-01-01') AS [PostedOn],
  ISNULL(LJT.reverseentry, 0) AS [ReversingEntry],
  ISNULL(LJT.reversedate, '1900-01-01') AS [ReversingDate],
  ISNULL(LJT.rejectedby, '') AS [RejectedBy],
  ISNULL(LJT.offsetaccounttype, 0) AS [OffsetAccountType],
  ISNULL(LJT.journaltotaloffsetbalance, 0) AS [BalanceJournal],
  ISNULL(LJT.journaltotaldebitreportingcurrency, 0) AS [DebitTotalReportingCurrency],
  ISNULL(LJT.journaltotalcreditreportingcurrency, 0) AS [CreditTotalReportingCurrency],
  ISNULL(LJT.numoflines, 0) AS [Lines],
  ISNULL(DD.PK_Date, 0) AS [FK_Date],
  ISNULL(DMA.PK_MainAccount, 0) AS [FK_MainAccount],
  ISNULL(DDept.PK_Department, 0) AS [FK_Department],
  ISNULL(DBS.PK_BusinessSegment, 0) AS [FK_BusinessSegment],
  ISNULL(DS.PK_Site, 0) AS [FK_Site],
  ISNULL(DW.PK_Worker, 0) AS [FK_Worker],
  ISNULL(DCC.PK_CostCenter, 0) AS [FK_CostCenter],
  ISNULL(DCType.PK_customertype, '') AS [FK_CustomerType],
  ISNULL(DIC.PK_Entity, 0) AS FK_Entity,
  ISNULL(GJAE.recid, 0) AS [RecID],
  ISNULL(GJAE.recversion, 0) AS [RecVersion],
  ISNULL(GJAE.lhname, '') AS [LHName],
  ISNULL(GJAE.isdelete, 0) AS [IsDelete],
  ISNULL(replace(wf.submitted_by, ',', ' '),'') as WFSubmittedBy,  
  ISNULL(wf.submitted_date,'') as SubmittedDate,  
  ISNULL(replace(wf.approved_by, ',', ' '),'') as WFApprovedBy,  
  ISNULL(wf.approved_date,'') as WFApprovedDate ,
  UPPER(GJE.subledgervoucherdataareaid) DataAreaID,
  GJE.DPCreatedDatetime,
  GJE.DPModifiedDatetime
 from [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].generaljournalentry GJE
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].generaljournalaccountentry GJAE 
   on  GJE.recid = GJAE.generaljournalentry AND GJE.lhname = GJAE.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].dimensionattributevaluecombination DAVC
   on  DAVC.recid = GJAE.ledgerdimension AND DAVC.lhname = GJAE.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].ledgerentryjournal LEJ
   on LEJ.recid = GJE.ledgerentryjournal AND LEJ.lhname = GJE.lhname
  left join LJT_1 LJT
   on LJT.journalnum = LEJ.journalnumber AND LJT.lhname = LEJ.lhname and GJE.subledgervoucherdataareaid = LJT.dataareaid --AND LJT.posted = 1
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[ledger] L
   on GJE.ledger = L.recid AND GJE.lhname = L.lhname
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[ledgerchartofaccounts] LCOA
   on L.chartofaccounts = LCOA.recid AND L.lhname = LCOA.lhname
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].mainaccount MA
   on MA.recid = DAVC.mainaccount AND MA.lhname = DAVC.lhname
  left join (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_MainAccount WHERE IsDelete = 0) DMA 
   ON DMA.MainAccountID = MA.mainaccountid AND DMA.LHName = MA.lhname /*AND MA.consolidationmainaccount = DMA.ConsolidationMainAccount*/ AND LCOA.name = DMA.ChartOfAccounts
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CostCenter') DVCC
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVCC.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVCC.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_CostCenter WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DCC
   ON coalesce(DVCC.costcentervalue, DVCC.[value], '') = DCC.CostCenterValue --AND DVCC.lhname = DCC.LHName 
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Department') DVD  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVD.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVD.lhname
  LEFT JOIN Finance.DIM_Department DDept
   ON coalesce(DVD.departmentvalue, DVD.[value], '') = DDept.DepartmentValue --AND DVD.lhname = DDept.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CustomerType') DVCT  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVCT.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVCT.lhname
  LEFT JOIN Finance.DIM_CustomerType DCType
   ON coalesce(DVCT.customertypevalue, DVCT.[value], '') = DCType.CustomerTypeValue
  left join (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Site') DVS   
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVS.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVS.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_Site WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DS
   ON coalesce(DVS.sitevalue, DVS.[value], '') = DS.SiteValue AND DAVC.lhname = DS.LHName AND DVS.DAVRECID = DS.Recid
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Intercompany') DVIC   
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVIC.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVIC.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_Entity] DIC
   ON UPPER(GJE.Subledgervoucherdataareaid) = UPPER(DIC.DataAreaID) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_WS_SC_UTF8 --AND DVIC.lhname = DIC.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Worker') DVW  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVW.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVW.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_Worker WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DW
   ON coalesce(DVW.workervalue, DVW.[value], '') = DW.WorkerValue AND DAVC.lhname = DW.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'BusinessSegment') DVBS   --SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CostCenter'
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVBS.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVBS.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_BusinessSegment]) DBS
   ON UPPER(coalesce(DVBS.businesssegmentvalue, DVBS.[value], '')) = UPPER(DBS.BusinessSegment) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_WS_SC_UTF8--AND DAVC.lhname = DCC.LHName
  LEFT JOIN [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_Date] DD
   ON GJE.accountingdate = DD.Fulldate
  LEFT JOIN wf  ON wf.contextrecid = LJT.recid
  -- LEFT JOIN #MaxProcessedDate M ON GJE.lhname = M.LHName
 Where /*GJE.dpmodifieddatetime > ISNULL(M.MaxProcessedDate, '1900-01-01')
  AND*/(
      (gjae.LHName = 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD'
       AND UPPER(gje.subledgervoucherdataareaid) = 'CRP'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-05-01')
  
   OR (gjae.LHName = 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD'
       AND UPPER(gje.subledgervoucherdataareaid) <> 'CRP'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-01-01')
  
   OR (gjae.LHName = 'LH_AX_APAC'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-01-01')
   
   -- "Else": everything that does NOT meet either of the two specific cases above
   OR (gjae.LHName <> 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD' OR gjae.LHName IS NULL)
  )  and GJE.isdelete =0
) as a

  UPPER(GJE.subledgervoucherdataareaid) DataAreaID,
  GJE.DPCreatedDatetime,
  GJE.DPModifiedDatetime
 from [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].generaljournalentry GJE
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].generaljournalaccountentry GJAE 
   on  GJE.recid = GJAE.generaljournalentry AND GJE.lhname = GJAE.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].dimensionattributevaluecombination DAVC
   on  DAVC.recid = GJAE.ledgerdimension AND DAVC.lhname = GJAE.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].ledgerentryjournal LEJ
   on LEJ.recid = GJE.ledgerentryjournal AND LEJ.lhname = GJE.lhname
  left join LJT_1 LJT
   on LJT.journalnum = LEJ.journalnumber AND LJT.lhname = LEJ.lhname and GJE.subledgervoucherdataareaid = LJT.dataareaid --AND LJT.posted = 1
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[ledger] L
   on GJE.ledger = L.recid AND GJE.lhname = L.lhname
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[ledgerchartofaccounts] LCOA
   on L.chartofaccounts = LCOA.recid AND L.lhname = LCOA.lhname
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].mainaccount MA
   on MA.recid = DAVC.mainaccount AND MA.lhname = DAVC.lhname
  left join (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_MainAccount WHERE IsDelete = 0) DMA 
   ON DMA.MainAccountID = MA.mainaccountid AND DMA.LHName = MA.lhname /*AND MA.consolidationmainaccount = DMA.ConsolidationMainAccount*/ AND LCOA.name = DMA.ChartOfAccounts
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CostCenter') DVCC
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVCC.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVCC.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_CostCenter WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DCC
   ON coalesce(DVCC.costcentervalue, DVCC.[value], '') = DCC.CostCenterValue --AND DVCC.lhname = DCC.LHName 
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Department') DVD  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVD.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVD.lhname
  LEFT JOIN Finance.DIM_Department DDept
   ON coalesce(DVD.departmentvalue, DVD.[value], '') = DDept.DepartmentValue --AND DVD.lhname = DDept.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CustomerType') DVCT  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVCT.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVCT.lhname
  LEFT JOIN Finance.DIM_CustomerType DCType
   ON coalesce(DVCT.customertypevalue, DVCT.[value], '') = DCType.CustomerTypeValue
  left join (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Site') DVS   
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVS.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVS.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_Site WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DS
   ON coalesce(DVS.sitevalue, DVS.[value], '') = DS.SiteValue AND DAVC.lhname = DS.LHName AND DVS.DAVRECID = DS.Recid
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Intercompany') DVIC   
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVIC.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVIC.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_Entity] DIC
   ON UPPER(GJE.Subledgervoucherdataareaid) = UPPER(DIC.DataAreaID) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_WS_SC_UTF8 --AND DVIC.lhname = DIC.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Worker') DVW  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVW.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVW.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_Worker WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DW
   ON coalesce(DVW.workervalue, DVW.[value], '') = DW.WorkerValue AND DAVC.lhname = DW.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'BusinessSegment') DVBS   --SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CostCenter'
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVBS.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVBS.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_BusinessSegment]) DBS
   ON UPPER(coalesce(DVBS.businesssegmentvalue, DVBS.[value], '')) = UPPER(DBS.BusinessSegment) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_WS_SC_UTF8--AND DAVC.lhname = DCC.LHName
  LEFT JOIN [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_Date] DD
   ON GJE.accountingdate = DD.Fulldate
  LEFT JOIN wf  ON wf.contextrecid = LJT.recid
  -- LEFT JOIN #MaxProcessedDate M ON GJE.lhname = M.LHName
 Where /*GJE.dpmodifieddatetime > ISNULL(M.MaxProcessedDate, '1900-01-01')
  AND*/(
      (gjae.LHName = 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD'
       AND UPPER(gje.subledgervoucherdataareaid) = 'CRP'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-05-01')
  
   OR (gjae.LHName = 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD'
       AND UPPER(gje.subledgervoucherdataareaid) <> 'CRP'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-01-01')
  
   OR (gjae.LHName = 'LH_AX_APAC'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-01-01')
   
   -- "Else": everything that does NOT meet either of the two specific cases above
   OR (gjae.LHName <> 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD' OR gjae.LHName IS NULL)
  )  and GJE.isdelete =0
) as a  group by lhname order by 1

source_query:
;WITH DimensionValues AS
 (
  SELECT DISTINCT DAVG.dimensionattributevaluecombination,
    ISNULL(da.name, '') AS [name],
    ISNULL(coalesce(dav.displayvalue, dalv.displayvalue, ''), '') AS [value],
    DAVG.lhname,
    DAVC.recid,
    DAVC.costcentervalue,
    DAVC.departmentvalue,
    DAVC.businesssegmentvalue,
    DAVC.sitevalue,
    DAVC.intercompanyvalue,
    DAVC.projectcodevalue,
    DAVC.workervalue,
    DAVC.customertypevalue,
    DAV.recid DAVRECID
  FROM [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].dimensionattributevaluecombination DAVC
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattributevaluegroupcombination] DAVG
    ON DAVG.dimensionattributevaluecombination = DAVC.recid AND DAVG.lhname = DAVC.lhname
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattributelevelvalue] as dalv
    on DAVG.dimensionattributevaluegroup = dalv.dimensionattributevaluegroup AND dalv.lhname = DAVG.lhname
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattributevalue] as dav
    ON dalv.dimensionattributevalue = dav.recid AND dalv.lhname = dav.lhname AND dalv.partition = dav.partition
    left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[dimensionattribute] as da
    on da.recid = dav.dimensionattribute AND da.partition = dav.partition and da.lhname = dav.lhname
 ),
 LatestStatus AS (
     SELECT
         wtst2.[partition],
         wtst2.recid,
         wtst2.contextrecid,
         wtst2.contextcompanyid,
   wtst2.lhname
     FROM (
         SELECT
     wtst2.*,
     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
         PARTITION BY wtst2.contextrecid
         ORDER BY wtst2.recid DESC
     ) AS rn
         FROM [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[workflowtrackingstatustable] wtst2
     JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[sqldictionary] sd ON sd.tableid = wtst2.contexttableid AND sd.fieldid = 0 AND sd.lhname = wtst2.lhname
         WHERE sd.name = 'LedgerJournalTable'
     ) wtst2
     WHERE wtst2.rn = 1
 ),
 TrackingTop AS (
     SELECT
    wtst.contextrecid,
    wtst.contextcompanyid,
    REPLACE(ui.name, ',', ' ') AS name,
    wtct.createddatetime,
    wtt.trackingtype,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
        PARTITION BY wtst.contextrecid, wtt.trackingtype
        ORDER BY wtt.recid DESC
    ) AS rn
     FROM [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[workflowtrackingtable] wtt
    JOIN LatestStatus wtst ON wtst.[partition] = wtt.[partition] AND wtst.recid = wtt.workflowtrackingstatustable AND wtt.lhname = wtst.lhname
    JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[workflowtrackingcommenttable] wtct ON wtct.[partition] = wtt.[partition] AND wtct.workflowtrackingtable = wtt.recid AND wtt.lhname = wtct.lhname
    JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[userinfo] ui ON ui.[partition] = wtt.[partition] AND ui.id = wtt.[user_] AND ui.lhname = wtt.lhname
     WHERE wtt.trackingtype IN (4, 23)
 ),
 wf AS (
  SELECT
      contextrecid,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 23 THEN name             END) AS submitted_by,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 23 THEN createddatetime  END) AS submitted_date,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 4  THEN name             END) AS approved_by,
      MIN(CASE WHEN trackingtype = 4  THEN createddatetime  END) AS approved_date
  FROM TrackingTop
  WHERE rn = 1
  GROUP BY contextrecid
 ),
 LJT_1 AS (
  SELECT *
  FROM (
   SELECT
     ljt.*,
     ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
     PARTITION BY ljt.lhname, ljt.dataareaid, ljt.journalnum
     ORDER BY
      COALESCE(ljt.dpmodifieddatetime, ljt.posteddatetime, ljt.createddatetime) DESC,
      ljt.recid DESC
     ) rn
   FROM lh_finance_silver.lh_finance.ledgerjournaltable ljt
   WHERE ljt.posted = 1
  ) x
  WHERE rn = 1
 ),

  ISNULL(GJE.postinglayer, 0) AS [Postinglayer],
  ISNULL(GJE.accountingdate, '1900-01-01') AS [AccountingDate],
  ISNULL(LJT.journalnum , '') AS [JournalBatchNumber],
  ISNULL(LJT.name , '') AS [JournalBatchDesc],
  ISNULL(LJT.approver, '') AS [ApprovedBy],
  ISNULL(LJT.journalname, '') AS [Name],
  ISNULL(LJT.posteddatetime, '1900-01-01') AS [PostedOn],
  ISNULL(LJT.reverseentry, 0) AS [ReversingEntry],
  ISNULL(LJT.reversedate, '1900-01-01') AS [ReversingDate],
  ISNULL(LJT.rejectedby, '') AS [RejectedBy],
  ISNULL(LJT.offsetaccounttype, 0) AS [OffsetAccountType],
  ISNULL(LJT.journaltotaloffsetbalance, 0) AS [BalanceJournal],
  ISNULL(LJT.journaltotaldebitreportingcurrency, 0) AS [DebitTotalReportingCurrency],
  ISNULL(LJT.journaltotalcreditreportingcurrency, 0) AS [CreditTotalReportingCurrency],
  ISNULL(LJT.numoflines, 0) AS [Lines],
  ISNULL(DD.PK_Date, 0) AS [FK_Date],
  ISNULL(DMA.PK_MainAccount, 0) AS [FK_MainAccount],
  ISNULL(DDept.PK_Department, 0) AS [FK_Department],
  ISNULL(DBS.PK_BusinessSegment, 0) AS [FK_BusinessSegment],
  ISNULL(DS.PK_Site, 0) AS [FK_Site],
  ISNULL(DW.PK_Worker, 0) AS [FK_Worker],
  ISNULL(DCC.PK_CostCenter, 0) AS [FK_CostCenter],
  ISNULL(DCType.PK_customertype, '') AS [FK_CustomerType],
  ISNULL(DIC.PK_Entity, 0) AS FK_Entity,
  ISNULL(GJAE.recid, 0) AS [RecID],
  ISNULL(GJAE.recversion, 0) AS [RecVersion],
  ISNULL(GJAE.lhname, '') AS [LHName],
  ISNULL(GJAE.isdelete, 0) AS [IsDelete],
  ISNULL(replace(wf.submitted_by, ',', ' '),'') as WFSubmittedBy,  
  ISNULL(wf.submitted_date,'') as SubmittedDate,  
  ISNULL(replace(wf.approved_by, ',', ' '),'') as WFApprovedBy,  
  ISNULL(wf.approved_date,'') as WFApprovedDate ,
  UPPER(GJE.subledgervoucherdataareaid) DataAreaID,
  GJE.DPCreatedDatetime,
  GJE.DPModifiedDatetime
 from [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].generaljournalentry GJE
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].generaljournalaccountentry GJAE 
   on  GJE.recid = GJAE.generaljournalentry AND GJE.lhname = GJAE.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].dimensionattributevaluecombination DAVC
   on  DAVC.recid = GJAE.ledgerdimension AND DAVC.lhname = GJAE.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].ledgerentryjournal LEJ
   on LEJ.recid = GJE.ledgerentryjournal AND LEJ.lhname = GJE.lhname
  left join LJT_1 LJT
   on LJT.journalnum = LEJ.journalnumber AND LJT.lhname = LEJ.lhname and GJE.subledgervoucherdataareaid = LJT.dataareaid --AND LJT.posted = 1
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[ledger] L
   on GJE.ledger = L.recid AND GJE.lhname = L.lhname
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].[ledgerchartofaccounts] LCOA
   on L.chartofaccounts = LCOA.recid AND L.lhname = LCOA.lhname
  left join [lh_finance_silver].[lh_finance].mainaccount MA
   on MA.recid = DAVC.mainaccount AND MA.lhname = DAVC.lhname
  left join (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_MainAccount WHERE IsDelete = 0) DMA 
   ON DMA.MainAccountID = MA.mainaccountid AND DMA.LHName = MA.lhname /*AND MA.consolidationmainaccount = DMA.ConsolidationMainAccount*/ AND LCOA.name = DMA.ChartOfAccounts
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CostCenter') DVCC
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVCC.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVCC.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_CostCenter WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DCC
   ON coalesce(DVCC.costcentervalue, DVCC.[value], '') = DCC.CostCenterValue --AND DVCC.lhname = DCC.LHName 
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Department') DVD  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVD.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVD.lhname
  LEFT JOIN Finance.DIM_Department DDept
   ON coalesce(DVD.departmentvalue, DVD.[value], '') = DDept.DepartmentValue --AND DVD.lhname = DDept.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CustomerType') DVCT  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVCT.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVCT.lhname
  LEFT JOIN Finance.DIM_CustomerType DCType
   ON coalesce(DVCT.customertypevalue, DVCT.[value], '') = DCType.CustomerTypeValue
  left join (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Site') DVS   
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVS.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVS.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_Site WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DS
   ON coalesce(DVS.sitevalue, DVS.[value], '') = DS.SiteValue AND DAVC.lhname = DS.LHName AND DVS.DAVRECID = DS.Recid
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Intercompany') DVIC   
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVIC.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVIC.lhname
  LEFT JOIN [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_Entity] DIC
   ON UPPER(GJE.Subledgervoucherdataareaid) = UPPER(DIC.DataAreaID) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_WS_SC_UTF8 --AND DVIC.lhname = DIC.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'Worker') DVW  
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVW.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVW.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT * FROM Finance.DIM_Worker WHERE IsSuspended = 0 AND IsDelete = 0) DW
   ON coalesce(DVW.workervalue, DVW.[value], '') = DW.WorkerValue AND DAVC.lhname = DW.LHName
  left join (SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'BusinessSegment') DVBS   --SELECT * FROM DimensionValues WHERE [name] = 'CostCenter'
   ON GJAE.ledgerdimension = DVBS.recid AND GJAE.lhname = DVBS.lhname
  LEFT JOIN (SELECT DISTINCT * FROM [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_BusinessSegment]) DBS
   ON UPPER(coalesce(DVBS.businesssegmentvalue, DVBS.[value], '')) = UPPER(DBS.BusinessSegment) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_CI_AS_KS_WS_SC_UTF8--AND DAVC.lhname = DCC.LHName
  LEFT JOIN [global_dw_dev].[GLD].[DIM_Date] DD
   ON GJE.accountingdate = DD.Fulldate
  LEFT JOIN wf  ON wf.contextrecid = LJT.recid
  -- LEFT JOIN #MaxProcessedDate M ON GJE.lhname = M.LHName
 Where /*GJE.dpmodifieddatetime > ISNULL(M.MaxProcessedDate, '1900-01-01')
  AND*/(
      (gjae.LHName = 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD'
       AND UPPER(gje.subledgervoucherdataareaid) = 'CRP'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-05-01')
  
   OR (gjae.LHName = 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD'
       AND UPPER(gje.subledgervoucherdataareaid) <> 'CRP'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-01-01')
  
   OR (gjae.LHName = 'LH_AX_APAC'
       AND gje.accountingdate >= '2025-01-01')
   
   -- "Else": everything that does NOT meet either of the two specific cases above
   OR (gjae.LHName <> 'LH_D365_NAADD_PRD' OR gjae.LHName IS NULL)
  )  and GJE.isdelete =0
) as a where recid in ({recid_list})
